name: todo-major-project
description: Full-stack ToDo web app (React client + Express/Mongo server).

scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npm --prefix todo-major-project/server install && npm --prefix todo-major-project/client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix todo-major-project/server run dev" "npm --prefix todo-major-project/client start"
